---
title: "Analyzing US Births and Basketball Recruits"
author: "Suhani Shah"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

# Read the file from your local 'data' folder
births_data <- read_excel("data/us_births_1994_2014.xlsx")

# Take a look at the data
glimpse(births_data)
```

```{r}
read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx") |> 
  select(rank, nba_mean_ws48, top_mean_wa, total_seasons, drafted) |> 
  summary()
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx") |> 
  count(tier)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)

# Read the data
read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx")|>
  mutate(
    tier = factor(
      tier,
      levels = c("Never played", "Brief career", "Solid career",
                 "All-Star level", "Superstar")
    ),
    recruit_group = factor(
      recruit_group,
      levels = c("#1–10", "#11–25", "#26–50", "#51–100", "Outside top 100")
    )
  ) |>
  count(recruit_group)
```

 
```{r}
# Read the file and save it as basketball_tibble
basketball_tibble <- read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx")
```

```{r}
glimpse(basketball_tibble)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

# 1. Read the data AND apply the factor transformations directly to basketball_tibble
basketball_tibble <- read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    tier = factor(
      tier, 
      levels = c("Never played", "Brief career", "Solid career", "All-Star level", "Superstar")
    ),
    recruit_group = factor(
      recruit_group, 
      levels = c("#1–10", "#11–25", "#26–50", "#51–100", "Outside top 100")
    )
  )

# 2. Take a look at your newly created data
glimpse(basketball_tibble)
```

```{r}
# 3. Create the bar chart using the correct variable name: fill = tier
ggplot(basketball_tibble, aes(y = recruit_group, fill = tier)) + 
  geom_bar(position = "fill") + 
  labs(x = "Proportion", y = "Recruit Group", fill = "Career Tier")
```


```{r}
basketball_tibble %>% 
  filter(recruit_group != "Outside top 100") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = recruit_group, fill = tier)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(x = "Proportion", y = "Recruit Group", fill = "Career Tier")
```


```{r}
basketball_tibble %>%
  filter(!is.na(nba_mean_ws48)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = nba_mean_ws48, y = recruit_group)) +
  geom_boxplot()

```

```{r}
basketball_tibble %>%
  filter(!is.na(rank), !is.na(top_mean_wa)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = rank, y = top_mean_wa)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = tier)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = FALSE) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = ifelse(name %in% c("Player 1", "Player 2", "Player 3", "Player 4"), name, "")),
    vjust = -0.5, hjust = 0.5, check_overlap = TRUE
  )

```
